message:
feat(config): add pane priority rules and capture budget configuration (bd-3lai)

Extends IngestConfig with two new configuration sections:

PanePriorityConfig:
- default_priority (u32, default 100) applied when no rule matches.
- Ordered rules list with first-match-wins semantics.
- PanePriorityRule reuses PaneFilterRule matchers (domain/title/cwd
  glob patterns) with a priority value (lower = higher priority).
- priority_for_pane() method for runtime lookup.
- Validation enforces unique rule IDs.

CaptureBudgetConfig:
- max_captures_per_sec (u32, 0 = unlimited): rate limit on capture
  operations across all panes.
- max_bytes_per_sec (u64, 0 = unlimited): bandwidth limit on captured
  data.

Integration:
- Both configs flow through HotReloadableConfig for live reloading.
- Config::diff_hot_reload detects changes for both sections.
- Config::validate calls priorities.validate() to catch duplicate IDs.
- PaneFilterRule derives PartialEq + Eq for change detection.

Tests:
- pane_priority_and_budget_toml_roundtrip: verifies TOML parsing of
  priorities and budgets with custom values.
- pane_priority_validation_duplicate_ids: verifies validation rejects
  duplicate rule IDs.
- hot_reloadable_config test updated to verify priority and budget
  values propagate correctly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
